name: meeting-scheduler-pro
description: Meeting Scheduler Pro dashboard metrics — meeting frequency, prep completion, follow-up tracking, calendar health.

metrics.label: Meetings Today
metrics.description: Number of meetings on today's calendar

metrics.label: Meetings This Week
metrics.description: Total meetings scheduled for the current week (Mon–Fri)

metrics.label: Prep Completion Rate
metrics.description: Percentage of meetings with a completed prep brief (last 30 days)

metrics.label: Follow-Ups Pending
metrics.description: Action items from meetings not yet completed

metrics.label: Busiest Day
metrics.description: Day of week with the most meetings (rolling 30 days)

metrics.label: Busiest Hour
metrics.description: Hour of day with the most meetings (rolling 30 days)

metrics.label: No-Show Rate
metrics.description: Percentage of meetings where attendee didn't join (last 30 days)

metrics.label: Buffer Compliance
metrics.description: Percentage of meetings with proper buffer time before/after

metrics.label: Agent-Booked Meetings
metrics.description: Meetings booked through the scheduling agent (vs manually created)
